{"id":2,"name":"Fossil reviver","x":10,"y":3,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":28,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_SCIENTIST","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["The fossil reviver finishes reviving the Pok\u00E9mon as "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["soon as you step out of the door. See the exit event "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["on this map."]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[2,"B",1]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bOh, hello. I\u0027m a scientist."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bI can turn fossils into living, breathing Pok\u00E9mon!"]},{"c":123,"i":1,"p":["B",0]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bAiyah! You come again!"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bDo you have a fossil for me?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Yes","No"],2]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Yes"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bWhich fossil do you want me to revive?"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbChooseFossil(9)"]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[12,"pbGet(9) == :NONE"]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["Player didn\u0027t choose a fossil."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bLet me know when you want me to revive a "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["fossil for you."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["Player chose a fossil."]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["$bag.remove(pbGet(9))"]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["data = GameData::Item.get(pbGet(9))"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pbSet(3, data.name)"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bOkay. I\u0027ll see if I can revive your \\v[3]."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bCome back later."]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["Convert fossil into species now."]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["conversion_hash = pbGet(9)"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["species = conversion_hash[item]"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pbSet(9, This is a relatively "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["straightforward \u0022choose an item from each of two "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["lists, add a Pok\u00E9mon based on what was chosen\u0022."]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[2,"B",1]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bHello, huh! My name is Carl Ess. I can turn "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["combinations of partial Fossils into living, breathing "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon!"]},{"c":123,"i":1,"p":["B",0]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["================================"]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["Check whether the player has at least one top fossil "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["and at least one bottom fossil. The result of this "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["check could have been stored in a Game Switch "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["rather than a Game Variable, because it\u0027s just \u0022yes or "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["no\u0022, but there are no Game Switches for temporary "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["values and I didn\u0027t feel like makng one just for this."]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["top = $bag.has?(:FOSSILIZEDBIRD) ||"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" $bag.has?(:FOSSILIZEDFISH)"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["btm = $bag.has?(:FOSSILIZEDDRAKE) ||"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" $bag.has?(:FOSSILIZEDDINO)"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["pbSet(1, (top \u0026\u0026 btm) ? 1 : 0)"]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[1,1,0,1,0]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["The choice of top fossil will be stored in Game Variable "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["1 (1=Bird, 2=Fish, 0=Quit)."]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["The choice of bottom fossil will be stored in Game "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["Variable 2 (1=Drake, 2=Dino, 0=Quit)."]},{"c":122,"i":1,"p":[1,1,0,0,0]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bHm? You\u0027ve got some Fossils there, huh. It seems the restoration was a "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["great success."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bYes, I can see it in its eyes. This is a Pok\u00E9mon that "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["walked the face of Essen in ancient times! Please "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["take and care for this Pok\u00E9mon, huh."]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[12,"pbAddToParty(pbGet(14), 1)"]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["$stats.revived_fossil_count \u002B= 1"]},{"c":122,"i":2,"p":[14,14,0,0,0]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon was added!"]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["The Pok\u00E9mon couldn\u0027t be added to the party. Keep its "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["species in Game Variable 14 and turn Self Switch A "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["on, to let the player collect it once they have space in "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["their party. See page 2 of this event."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bOh, you don\u0027t have space in your party, huh. Make "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["some room and then come back here for your "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon."]},{"c":123,"i":2,"p":["A",0]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["The species to be revived is not defined. Do nothing."]},{"c":122,"i":1,"p":[14,14,0,0,0]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bOh. They don\u0027t seem to work together."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":115,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["================================"]},{"c":118,"i":0,"p":["Quit"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bMaybe some other time, then."]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]},{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":true,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_SCIENTIST","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bHuh, have you made some room for your Pok\u00E9mon "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["yet?"]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[12,"pbAddToParty(pbGet(14), 1)"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["$stats.revived_fossil_count \u002B= 1"]},{"c":122,"i":1,"p":[14,14,0,0,0]},{"c":123,"i":1,"p":["A",1]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bYou haven\u0027t. Make some room and then come back "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["here."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}
